dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: By Q2 2025, how many uploaded content items in MediConn’s knowledge management system underwent internal quality review?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: According to Mediconn internal data between January 1 and June 30, 2025, 150 uploaded items were reviewed for accuracy and compliance.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: How many clinician feedback suggestions were implemented in MediConn’s knowledge management system for workflow improvements in 2024?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: From January 1 to December 31, 2024, 70 feedback suggestions from clinicians were integrated in Mediconn's knowledge management database to improve platform usability.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: How many internal compliance checkpoints were completed during MediConn’s general quality audit in 2023?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: 29 compliance checkpoints were completed between January 1 and December 31, 2023.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: Did new clinicians in 2025 participate in MediConn’s onboarding training to use the knowledge management system properly?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: Yes. Internal records show that new clinicians hired in 2025 completed the required onboarding training.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: How does MediConn categorize general platform resources within its knowledge management system as of March 2025?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: As of March 2025, MediConn organizes its knowledge management content into 12 main resource categories to help users navigate the platform more easily.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: In Q4 2024, how many newly approved documentation standards were added to MediConn’s knowledge database for clinician reference?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: According to internal updates, 15 new documentation standards were added to MediConn's knowledge database between October 1 and December 31, 2024.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: In Q4 2024, how many newly approved medications were added to MediConn’s prescription knowledge database for clinician reference?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: According to internal data from MediConn’s Telehealth Department between October 1 and December 31, 42 newly approved medications were added to the knowledge management system.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: How does the centralization of medical reference materials on MediConn’s platform support clinicians in making safe prescribing decisions in 2025?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: As of November 20, 2024, MediConn’s internal system consolidates all relevant clinical references, guidelines, and educational resources in one place, updated weekly by the platform team.
